title: Desi Beats
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular Punjabi songs composed by renowned artists and singers played back-to-back.

title: Kamli Ishq Di
subTitle: Veer, a young man who wants to join the Indian Army and dedicate his life to his country, faces a dilemma when he develops feelings for Mahi.

title: Geet Dholi
subTitle: A young woman, who loves to play the dhol, tries to live in a society dominated by men with her husband's undying support.

title: Dheeyan Meriyan
subTitle: Harleen and Khushpreet try to manipulate Harjinder. Elsewhere, Roop meets Harman and tells him about Yuvraj's love for Sargun.

title: Rakhdi Rishte Sanjo Ke.Chhoti Jathani
subTitle: Ajooni, a young woman, falls in love and marries Zorawar, a simple man. However, their marital bliss is interrupted when Zorawar's sister-in-law, Savreen, tries to assert her dominance in the house.

title: Thappa
subTitle: When a small-town reporter's fake video about ghosts succeeds, he uses his success to buy a new house. However, when the building turns out to be haunted, his life turns upside down.

title: Desi Beats
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular Punjabi songs composed by renowned artists and singers played back-to-back.

title: Guddiyan Patole
subTitle: Two sisters, who live in Canada, return to their village to meet their maternal family. Hilarity ensues when they end up taking their grandmother on an impromptu trip.

subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most popular Punjabi songs composed by renowned artists and singers played back-to-back.

title: Nayan... Jo Vekhe Unvekha
subTitle: Divansh begins regaining his consciousness after the accident while the policemen explain the foul play involved in his accident to Rajbeer.

title: Honeymoon
subTitle: A couple decides to go on a honeymoon. However, the trip takes an emotional turn when their family decides to join them and celebrate a major land deal.

title: Aatishbaazi Ishq
subTitle: Veera and Fateh, a young village couple, decide to get married after Fateh's police academy training. But things get complicated when Jigar, a local wrestler, gets obsessed with Veera and stalks her.

title: Gol Gappe
subTitle: Due to a cross connection, three friends who own a fast-food restaurant get a ransom call from an infamous don. However, hilarity ensues when they decide to demand a double ransom.
